canonical.source_en: Research note v3.1 LOCKED — 1,199 signals across 500 tech stocks (DB3, 2022-2026). 88.5% is the 80-day result from the 52-signal sub-window where every signal completes.
canonical.source_zh: 研究终稿 v3.1 锁定版 — 数据库 3 号 · 500 只科技股 · 2022-2026 共 1,199 笔信号。88.5% 是 52 笔完整 80 日测试子窗口的胜率。

findings.label_en: Hold period is a vastly under-rated variable
findings.label_zh: 持有期是被严重低估的变量
findings.body_en: The same 52 entry signals produce a 50.0% win rate at a 5-day hold and an 88.5% win rate at an 80-day hold. Hold period doesn't just scale returns — it changes the strategy's identity.
findings.body_zh: 同一批 52 笔进场信号：5 日持有胜率 50.0%，80 日持有胜率 88.5%。持有期决定的不只是收益大小，是策略的本质。

findings.label_zh: 市场风格决定策略命运
findings.body_en: 2022 rewarded short-term reversal (81.5% at 10d). 2025+ rewards medium-term trend holding (88.5% at 80d). The model didn't change — the regime did. There is no permanently optimal strategy; there are only matched holds.
findings.body_zh: 2022 年震荡市奖励短线反转（10 日 81.5%）；2025 年起主线持仓奖励中线趋势（80 日 88.5%）。模型没变，市场变了。没有永远有效的策略，只有匹配市场的持有期。

findings.label_zh: 短线"失效"往往是视角错配
findings.body_en: Q4 2025 looked like model collapse: 10-day win rate fell to 41.7%. The same signals at 80-day hold: 71.4%. Question your viewpoint before you question the model — most apparent failures are wrong holding periods, not broken edges.
findings.body_zh: 2025 Q4 看似 v3.1 灾难季（10 日胜率 41.7%），同一批信号用 80 日持有：71.4%。怀疑视角，不要急着怀疑模型 —— 大多数"看似失效"只是持有期错配。

findings.label_en: Smart filters are usually overfitting in disguise
findings.label_zh: 聪明的过滤往往是过拟合的伪装
findings.body_en: Sector strength filter, relative-strength check, dynamic exits, RSI band tightening — all tested, all failed. Each looked smarter than the base model; each made results worse. Simple core rules + the right hold period beat layered filters.
findings.body_zh: 板块强度过滤、相对强度检查、动态退出、RSI 区间收窄 —— 全部测过，全部失败。每一个看起来都比原版更"聪明"，每一个都让结果更差。简单核心规则 + 正确持有期，胜过复杂层层过滤。

market_regime.note_en: Sector rotation rapid; 5-10 day mean reversion worked everywhere. Anything resembling a reversal strategy made money.
market_regime.note_zh: 板块快速轮动；5-10 日均值回归在各处都有效。任何形似反转策略的方法都在这一年赚钱。

market_regime.note_en: Capital lacked consensus direction; reversal strategies fail across the board. Not the model — the market.
market_regime.note_zh: 资金一致性预期不足，方向感弱；短线反转策略集体失灵。不是模型的问题，是市场的问题。

market_regime.note_en: 5-day hold 71% vs 20-day hold 41% — sectors diverge, short-term plays still work but holding longer is dangerous in this choppy regime.
market_regime.note_zh: 5 日持有 71% vs 20 日持有 41% — 板块分化加剧，震荡市下短线还能做、拿太久反而成雷。

market_regime.note_en: AI / compute / semis become strong main lines. Quarter swings (Q2 76.5%, Q4 41.7% at 10-day) — but at 80-day hold, Q4 recovers to 71.4%. The hold-period mismatch becomes visible.
market_regime.note_zh: AI、算力、半导体成为强势主线。季度波动巨大（Q2 76.5%、Q4 41.7% 10 日口径），但用 80 日重测 Q4，胜率回到 71.4%。持有期错配第一次显形。

market_regime.note_en: Short dips no longer rebound. The 5-day win rate falls to 38% — the model looks broken. It is not. The same signals at 80-day hold are the canonical 88.5%. The edge is now in medium-term trends, not in short reversion.
market_regime.note_zh: 短期回调不再立刻反弹。5 日胜率仅 38% —— 模型看似失效。实际不是。同样的信号用 80 日持有就是锁定的 88.5%。alpha 在中线趋势中，不在短线反转。

research_rigor.body_en: 500 tech stocks · 2022-01 to 2026-02 · daily bars. Chronologically split into a training period and a held-out test period — never shuffled, no look-ahead, no re-tuning on the test set after the rule structure was locked.
research_rigor.body_zh: 500 只科技股 · 2022-01 至 2026-02 · 日线数据。按时间顺序切成训练期与留出测试期 —— 不打乱、不前瞻、规则结构锁定后绝不在测试集上重新调参。

research_rigor.body_en: 2022–2024 · 21,143 daily observations. Chosen for high regime variance — includes a bull (2022), a collapse (2023), and a choppy market (2024). Rule structure (number of rules + which indicator families) fixed by IC analysis on this window before the test period was opened.
research_rigor.body_zh: 2022-2024 · 共 21,143 条日线样本。这个窗口包含高度异质的市场环境 —— 2022 牛市、2023 崩跌、2024 震荡。规则结构（条数与指标族）在打开测试期前已由训练集 IC 分析锁定。

research_rigor.body_en: 2025+ · 15,073 daily observations · held out completely until the final rule set was selected. All headline metrics on this page — 88.5%, 1,199-signal scan, hold-period table — are measured on this out-of-sample period, never on data the model saw during training.
research_rigor.body_zh: 2025+ · 共 15,073 条日线样本 · 在最终规则集选定之前从未被模型看过。本页所有头条数字 —— 88.5%、1,199 笔信号扫描、持有期表 —— 全部测在这个样本外窗口，不是训练期数据。

research_rigor.body_en: Headline win rates are gross of execution costs. For a realistic retail-broker scenario, deduct approximately 10–15 bps round-trip (commission + slippage + 5 bp stamp duty on sells). For institutional execution, approximately 2–5 bps. The 88.5% gross win rate translates to ≈87% net for retail and ≈88% net for institutional on liquid tech names.
research_rigor.body_zh: 头条胜率为不计成本的毛值。零售券商口径下，扣除约 10-15 个基点的往返成本（佣金 + 滑点 + 卖出 0.05% 印花税）。机构执行约 2-5 bps。在流动性较好的科技股样本中，88.5% 毛胜率对应零售约 87%、机构约 88% 净胜率。

research_rigor.body_en: Two hard guardrails complement the entry signal: (i) a per-position drawdown stop at a fixed percentage threshold, and (ii) a market-regime gate that forces full liquidation if HS300 falls below its 20-day moving average AND ChiNext's 20-day return drops past a documented threshold. Specific levels withheld; the architecture is disclosed.
research_rigor.body_zh: 两条硬性风控配合入场信号：(i) 单仓最大回撤止损（固定阈值）；(ii) 大盘环境门控 —— 当沪深 300 跌破 20 日均线、且创业板 20 日跌幅突破设定线时，强制清仓。具体阈值不公开，结构公开。

research_rigor.body_en: Single time-series split (not k-fold cross-validation) — the rule set was locked on training data before any test-set evaluation. The 80-day hold result (88.5%) is reported on the only sub-window where every signal can complete the full 80-day horizon (May 2025 – Feb 2026, n=52). Within-test stability is shown by the year-by-year breakdown in §02.
research_rigor.body_zh: 时间序列单次切分（不是 k 折交叉验证）—— 规则集在打开测试集前已锁定。88.5% 这个 80 日结果只在所有信号都能跑完整 80 日持有期的子窗口（2025-05 至 2026-02、52 笔）上报告。测试集内部的稳定性可从 §02 的分年度表中观察。

universe_label_zh: 半导体板块龙头（A 股）
criterion_en: Protected research logic — public page shows results only.
criterion_zh: 受保护的研究逻辑 — 公开页面只展示结果。

result_summary.v2_note_en: Large-sample validation showed the original core signal was real, but not mythical.
result_summary.v2_note_zh: 大样本验证证明原始核心信号有效，但不是神话。

model_timeline.body_en: The first locked buy signal extracted from real trading records. It proved the sample contains a repeatable edge, but large-sample testing pulled the win rate back to a realistic ~68%.
model_timeline.body_zh: 从真实买入记录中提炼出的第一版锁定买点。它证明样本里确实有可重复特征，但大样本验证把胜率拉回更真实的约 68%。

model_timeline.body_en: v3.1 did not simply add complexity. Its real value was forcing version discipline: stop changing rules after seeing results, then test the locked signal across regimes and holding periods.
model_timeline.body_zh: v3.1 不是简单堆复杂条件。它真正的价值是建立版本纪律：看结果之后不再改规则，而是拿锁定信号去跨行情、跨持有期验证。

model_timeline.body_en: v4 moved from one buy signal to a tiered framework. It can evaluate short-term moves and medium/long-term holds; the stricter v4.S layer is designed for the strongest medium-term trend opportunities.
model_timeline.body_zh: v4 从单一买点升级为分层框架。它既能看短线，也能看中长线；其中筛选最严格的 v4.S 层，目标是捕捉最强的中线趋势机会。

model_timeline.body_en: Entry and exit are separated. Short-term exits can reduce drawdown, but the strongest discovery is that strict signals often need 60-120 days to express their edge.
model_timeline.body_zh: 买点和卖点分开研究。短线卖点能降低回撤，但最强发现是：越严格的信号往往需要 60-120 日才能充分释放优势。

v4_horizon.body_en: Useful for checking whether the entry has immediate follow-through, but not where the model's strongest edge appears.
v4_horizon.body_zh: 适合验证买点是否有短期跟随，但这不是模型最强的地方。

v4_horizon.body_en: The signal starts to reveal its true character as a trend-entry filter rather than a quick reversal trade.
v4_horizon.body_zh: 信号开始显露真正属性：它更像趋势进场过滤器，而不是单纯短线反转交易。

v4_horizon.body_en: The strictest layer filters harder and fires less often, but historically produced the strongest medium/long-term results.
v4_horizon.body_zh: 最严格的层级筛得更少，但历史上给出了最强的中长线结果。

strategy_compare.note_zh: 收益更高，但尾部风险更大。

strategy_compare.note_en: Lower drawdown, but may exit strong trends too early.
strategy_compare.note_zh: 回撤更低，但可能卖飞强趋势票。
